summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of SingleStore cluster diagnostics dashboard. All major features working correctly including report upload, dashboard navigation, all 7 tabs with sub-tabs, and back navigation.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
Report upload functionality working
Report processing completed in 4.4s
All 14 backend endpoints working (overview, nodes, storage, queries, logs, recommendations)
Homepage loads with upload area and reports list
Report navigation to dashboard working
Dashboard Overview tab shows 10 nodes (8L/2A), 17 recommendations with doc links
DB disk usage chart displaying correctly
Detected log patterns showing OOM events (224 occurrences)
Dmesg events displaying kernel-level issues
Log summary per node working
Nodes tab shows 10 per-node health cards with memory/disk/swap bars
Node sort buttons working (hostname, memory, disk)
Storage tab has 4 sub-tabs: Databases, Disk Usage (treemap), Partitions, Tables
Disk usage treemap visualization working
Partition distribution per host analysis working
Queries tab has 5 sub-tabs: Queries, Processlist, Blocked, Pools, WLM
Resource pools showing 5 pools with concurrency/queue details
Logs tab has search functionality, 5 severity filters, node filter, pagination
Config tab has 5 sub-tabs: OS Tuning, Variables, License, Backups, Users
OS Tuning checklist shows 7 pass/fail checks
Variables consistency check showing MISMATCH flags for inconsistent variables
License showing Premium type, 36 days remaining
Backups showing 2778 total with per-DB breakdown
Users showing 146 users
Recommendations tab shows findings grouped by category with doc links
All recommendations have doc_link, evidence, remediation, related_views fields
Expand/collapse all functionality working
Severity filter working (critical/warning)
Back navigation from dashboard to report list working
